data.title: US Stocks Likely To Open Lower, Analysts Warn 'Prolonged Uncertainty Could Hurt Both US And Global Risk Assets'
data.description: U.S. stock futures fell on Friday after two consecutive days of decline on Wednesday and Thursday. Futures of benchmark indices were lower.

data.title: Trump's SEC Pick Paul Atkins Says His 'Top Priority' Will Be 'Rational' Crypto Regulations, Marking Shift From Gary Gensler's Approach
data.description: Paul Atkins, former U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) member and President Donald Trump's nominee to head the agency, has pledged a new approach towards crypto regulation.

data.title: China's Top Chipmaker SMIC Accused Of Poaching Taiwan's Engineers Via Samoan Front Company
data.description: Taiwan is investigating whether China's chipmaker SMIC used a fake Samoan front company to illegally recruit local semiconductor engineers.

data.title: Rocket Lab Joins US Space Force's $5.6 Billion Launch Program; Stock Soars
data.description: Rocket Lab USA secures eligibility for the U.S. Space Force's NSSL Phase 3 Lane 1, a $5.6 billion initiative. The company plans to deploy its Neutron rocket, a reusable medium-lift vehicle, for critical national security launches. With 63 Electron missions completed, Rocket Lab strengthens its position as a key player in the defense and space industry.

data.title: Intel Board Shake-Up Continues As Three Directors Exit Amid Leadership Overhaul Under CEO Lip-Bu Tan
data.description: Intel is continuing its leadership overhaul under new CEO Lip-Bu Tan, with three board members set to exit.
